# Validating the generated file {#sec-validating}

*Learning objectives: confirm the file is portal-ready before attempting upload.*

## Structural self-checks

<!-- TODO: ebv_properties() slot by slot -->

## Visual check with `ebv_map()`

<!-- TODO: adapt faq.qmd "The map looks shifted by 180°" -->

## Cross-checking against the metadata JSON

<!-- TODO -->

## External validation (Panoply, portal validator)

<!-- TODO -->

## Pre-flight checklist

<!-- TODO: tick-box summary -->

**Checkpoint:** you can explain why each check matters and have run all of them on your file.
